history.en: Ancient traditional herding dog from León Province in northwest Spain, used for centuries to manage and guide flocks, particularly Merino sheep. Highly valued for hardiness, intelligence, and unwavering work ethic in mountainous terrain and rural environments.
history.zh: 来自西班牙西北部莱昂省的古老传统牧羊犬，几个世纪以来用于管理和引导羊群，特别是美利奴羊。因其在山区和农村环境中的耐寒性、智慧和不懈的工作精神而备受重视。

overview.en: The Carea Leonés is a highly intelligent, loyal, and energetic herding breed from the León Province of Spain. Bred for centuries to manage Merino sheep in mountainous terrain, this dog possesses an unwavering work ethic and remarkable alertness. It is athletic and agile, with a strong instinct to herd and protect. While deeply devoted to its family, it can be reserved with strangers, making it an excellent watchdog. This breed thrives on having a job to do and requires consistent mental and physical stimulation. Its personality is a blend of independence and responsiveness, making it both a challenging and rewarding companion for experienced owners who understand its working heritage.
overview.zh: 莱昂牧羊犬是一种来自西班牙莱昂省的高度聪明、忠诚且精力充沛的牧羊犬种。几个世纪以来，它被培育用于在山区地形中管理美利奴羊群，因此拥有坚定的工作伦理和非凡的警觉性。这种犬运动能力强、敏捷，具有强烈的放牧和保护本能。虽然对家人极为忠诚，但对陌生人可能保持保留态度，是出色的看门犬。该犬种需要持续的工作任务以及身心的双重刺激。其性格兼具独立性和回应性，对于理解其工作血统、有经验的饲主来说，既是挑战也是回报。

care.en: Daily care for the Carea Leonés includes moderate grooming: a weekly brushing with a slicker brush or rake to remove dead hair, increasing to daily during seasonal shedding. Bathing is needed only occasionally unless it gets very dirty. Exercise is crucial—this breed needs at least 60-90 minutes of vigorous activity daily, such as running, hiking, or structured herding games. Without sufficient exercise, it may become destructive or anxious. Routine vet visits should include annual check-ups, vaccinations, and parasite prevention. Dental care (brushing 2-3 times per week) and nail trimming every few weeks are also important. Early socialization is recommended to ensure it adapts well to various environments.
care.zh: 莱昂牧羊犬的日常护理包括适度的梳理：每周用针梳或脱毛梳梳理一次以去除死毛，换毛季节需增加至每天一次。除非特别脏，否则只需偶尔洗澡。运动至关重要——该犬种每天需要至少60-90分钟的高强度活动，如跑步、远足或结构化的放牧游戏。如果运动不足，它可能会变得具有破坏性或焦虑。常规兽医检查应包括年度体检、疫苗接种和寄生虫预防。牙齿护理（每周刷牙2-3次）和每几周修剪指甲也很重要。建议尽早进行社会化训练，以确保它能良好适应各种环境。

training.en: Training a Carea Leonés requires patience, consistency, and a firm but positive approach. This breed is intelligent and learns quickly, but it also has an independent streak due to its history of making decisions while herding. Use reward-based methods like treats, praise, and play to keep it engaged. Harsh corrections may cause it to shut down or become stubborn. Start with basic obedience and gradually introduce advanced tasks like agility or herding trials. Short, varied sessions (10-15 minutes) work best to maintain its focus. Early socialization with people, dogs, and different environments is essential to prevent over-protectiveness or shyness. A well-trained Carea Leonés is a reliable and versatile working partner.
training.zh: 训练莱昂牧羊犬需要耐心、一致性以及坚定但积极的方法。该犬种聪明且学习迅速，但由于其历史上需要在放牧中自主决策，因此带有独立倾向。使用基于奖励的方法，如零食、表扬和玩耍，以保持其参与度。严厉的纠正可能导致它退缩或变得固执。从基础服从训练开始，逐步引入高级任务如敏捷性或牧羊测试。短时间且多样化的训练课程（10-15分钟）最能维持其注意力。早期与人类、其他犬只及不同环境的社会化至关重要，以防止过度保护或害羞。一只训练有素的莱昂牧羊犬是可靠且多才多艺的工作伙伴。

diet.en: The Carea Leonés thrives on a high-quality diet formulated for active, medium-to-large breeds. Its food should be rich in animal protein (25-30%) and healthy fats to support its energy levels and lean muscle mass. Portion control is important to prevent obesity, especially if its workload decreases. Feed two measured meals per day rather than free-feeding. Include omega-3 fatty acids for coat health and joint supplements like glucosamine if it is highly active or aging. Fresh water must always be available. Avoid foods with excessive fillers, artificial additives, or high grain content. Consult your vet to adjust portions based on age, weight, and activity level.
diet.zh: 莱昂牧羊犬适合食用专为活跃的中大型犬配制的高品质狗粮。其食物应富含动物蛋白（25-30%）和健康脂肪，以支持其能量水平和瘦肌肉量。控制食量很重要，以防止肥胖，特别是在工作量减少时。每天分两次定量喂食，而非自由采食。包括欧米伽-3脂肪酸以维护毛发健康，如果犬只高度活跃或年长，可添加葡萄糖胺等关节补充剂。必须随时提供新鲜饮水。避免含有过多填充物、人工添加剂或高谷物含量的食物。请咨询兽医根据年龄、体重和活动水平调整食量。

livingTips.en: The Carea Leonés is best suited to a home with a large, securely fenced yard where it can run and play. It is not an ideal apartment dog due to its high energy and need for space. This breed thrives in rural or suburban settings with access to open areas. It can live harmoniously with children if raised with them, but herding instincts may lead it to nip at heels during play—supervision is needed. With proper socialization, it can get along with other pets, though it may try to herd them. It is alert and may bark at noises, so early training to manage barking is helpful. A job or regular activity is essential to prevent boredom.
livingTips.zh: 莱昂牧羊犬最适合拥有大型、安全围栏庭院的家庭，以便它能奔跑和玩耍。由于精力旺盛且需要空间，它不太适合公寓生活。该犬种在能接近开阔区域的乡村或郊区环境中表现最佳。如果与孩子一起长大，它可以与孩子和谐相处，但放牧本能可能导致它在玩耍时轻咬脚跟——需要监督。经过适当的社会化，它可以与其他宠物相处，但可能会试图放牧它们。它很警觉，可能会对噪音吠叫，因此早期训练控制吠叫很有帮助。拥有工作或定期活动对于防止无聊至关重要。
